Palettes by style

Color Library

Curated palettes — primary, accent and material colours — for each architectural language.

Modern

Open

Crisp, optimistic, luminous — colour as sparing punctuation on a neutral field.

Architectural White
#f2efe8
Concrete Grey
#b8b3a8
Primary Red
#b5352b
Cobalt
#2f5e8c
Ochre
#caa14a
Glass Blue
#a8bcc4
Steel
#6f7479

Contemporary

Open

Balanced, refined, neutral with a controlled accent.

Neutral Grey
#b9b4ab
Warm White

Charcoal

Bronze

Metal

Minimalism

Open

Calm, neutral, meditative — colour from material and light, not pigment.

#ece8df
Concrete Grey
#c3beb4
Charcoal
#3a3934
Muted Oak

Stone

Glass

Open

Light, warm, natural — soft neutrals grounded by dark timber.

Open

Quiet, earthy, natural — restrained neutrals tied to garden and light.

Soft Grey

Open

Raw, earthy, urban — warm brick against cool dark steel.

High-Tech

Open

Precise, energetic and optimistic — primary colours code function on a metallic field.

Silver Grey
#aeb3b6
Glass Blue
#a6c0c8
Pompidou Blue
#2f6fae
Service Red
#c0392b
Duct Yellow

Parametric

Open

Futuristic, serene, fluid — mostly white/neutral to read continuity.

Pure White
#f1eee7
Soft Grey
#cfcabf
Liquid Silver
#b3b8bb
Deep Charcoal
#33322e

Deconstructivism

Open

Charged, dramatic, otherworldly — metallics and high contrast.

Titanium Silver
#b6babd
Steel Grey
#5e6368
Signal Red
#b23a2e
Void Black
#1c1d1f
Glass Blue
#9fb7be

Brutalism

Open

Sombre, powerful, elemental — relieved by occasional bold accents.

Raw Concrete
#9a958c
Shadow Grey
#6c685f
Oxide Red
#9c4a32
Bottle Green
#3c5045
Weathered Brown
#7a6a55
Aggregate

A practical, exterior-focused architectural design reference — choose a direction and architectural language for any project. Built for design teams.
